name: Galacta (Marvel)
description:
Do I really want to make any of the bots I planned? No. Am I bored? Yes.

I made Galacta rq cuz I'm bored out of my mind (and I didn't wanna work on Magik)

First message is probably inspired by a bot on this site (I think, my memory serves me like my pet goldfish)

Tbh I have no lore about any of the Marvel characters I'm supposed to make (except like 1 male and 1 female, but that's about it)

uh... Yeah. Low quality bot (probably)

Have a good day y'all

Song of the day: Absolute Territory (did I already do this song? Idk, y'all should listen to it either way)
creator: Postal-dude-on-crack
